text: Today we are ranking Raspberries as a fruit, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.
fat is 0.7g. omega 3 is doing huge work here.
carbs is 11.9g. sugar and glycemic index stand out most.
protein is 1.2g. bioavailability is doing serious work here.
vitamin c at 31% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most.
potassium at 3% DV, magnesium at 5% DV stand out most.
biggest pros: excellent fruit-category fit. contains useful polyphenols. light for the volume.
biggest cons: quite perishable. can be pricey. protein contribution is negligible.
That is a S tier food. Raspberries lands at 57 overall.
